subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory and remembrance and splendor befit the champions in the arena of inner meanings and divine utterance, whom the clamor of the ungodly [3.5s]... ...Entreat thou the one true God to enable his faithful servants fulfil that which is conducive to the good of this world and the world to come… Blessed are they that occupy themselves in the House of Worship with the remembrance of Him… The benefits accruing from benevolent works shall fall to the individuals concerned... Whenever they make reference to the Ḥuqúq, let them confine themselves to a mere word uttered for the sake of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا و ذکر و بها صفدران مضمار معانی و بیان را لایق و سزا که ضوضاء مشرکین
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @law of Huququ'llah, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
